name: rapp
description: The species root. All RAPP organisms descend from this rappid via the parent_rappid chain. See CONSTITUTION.md Article XXXIV.
_attestation_note: When a variant master is created from this rappid, the variant's rappid.json carries an `attestation` envelope signed by THIS rappid's release key, asserting the parent_rappid + parent_commit it forked from. The master rappid itself has no parent, so `attestation` is null. See pages/vault/Architecture/Signed Releases and Variant Attestation.md.
